title: stelis dialissa
intro: Stelis dialissa, a type of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, Stelis dialissa has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Stelis dialissa can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
